name: Mathmech Nabla
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>斬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>キ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ナブラ
desc: You can Tribute 1 Cyberse monster; Special Summon 1 "Mathmech" monster from your Deck. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 Cyberse monster you control in the Extra Monster Zone; it can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase this turn. You can only use each effect of "Mathmech Nabla" once per turn.
